'''''Challenge'' 43''' was a roleplaying magazine from April/May [[1990]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including two adventures for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The articles were called "[[On the Dark Side]]" & "[[The Nuns of G'aav'aar'oon]]," and both were written by [[Marcus L. Rowland]].
